parameters.query: SELECT session_id, role, content FROM chat_history WHERE session_id !~ '^__' AND created_at >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires') AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires' ORDER BY session_id, created_at

SELECT replace(session_id, '__ad_source__:', '') AS session_id FROM chat_history WHERE session_id LIKE '__ad_source__:%' AND created_at >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires') AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'

nodes.name: Traer origenes de anuncio del dia
